passage: Attention all Grade 8 students! We are going to have a field trip to the City Science Museum next Friday, March 15th. The bus will leave school at 8:30 a.m. and return at 3:00 p.m. Please bring your own lunch and a water bottle. You should wear comfortable shoes because we will walk a lot. The museum has a new robot exhibition, and I am sure you will love it. If you have any questions, please come to the school office before Wednesday.
question: What is the main purpose of this notice?
options: To sell tickets for a robot show
To tell students about a field trip
To ask students to bring robots to school
To explain how to make a school lunch
answer: To tell students about a field trip
explanation: 公告的主旨是要通知八年級學生關於前往市立科學博物館的校外教學（field trip）。第一句即明確指出「We are going to have a field trip to the City Science Museum next Friday」

passage: Dear Kevin, Thank you for inviting me to your basketball game last Saturday. I had a great time watching you play! Your team was much better than the other team, and you scored the most points. This weekend, my family is going to have a barbecue in the park. Would you like to join us? We will start at noon and finish around 4 p.m. My dad makes the best grilled chicken, and I think you will enjoy it. Please let me know by Friday. Your friend, Jason
question: What did Jason do last Saturday?
options: He played in a basketball game
He had a barbecue in the park
He cooked grilled chicken with his dad
explanation: 信件第一段提到「Thank you for inviting me to your basketball game last Saturday. I had a great time watching you play!」，Jason 上週六去看了Kevin的籃球比賽。

options: To say sorry for missing the game

answer: To invite Kevin to a barbecue

passage: Amy: Hey Ben, are you going to join any school clubs this year? Ben: Yes, I am thinking about the swimming club. I heard the coach is very good. Amy: That sounds fun! But isn't swimming harder than running? Ben: Maybe, but I think it's more interesting. You can also make more friends in the pool than on the track. Amy: That's true. I joined the art club last year, but I want to try something new. Maybe I will join the swimming club too. Ben: Great! Let's go together after school tomorrow.
question: Why does Ben prefer swimming over running?
options: Because he thinks swimming is more interesting
Because the running club is full
Because Amy asked him to swim
answer: Because he thinks swimming is more interesting
explanation: Ben 在對話中說「Maybe, but I think it's more interesting」，明確表示他覺得游泳比跑步更有趣，所以選擇游泳社。

passage: Last month, my class went on a three-day trip to Sun Moon Lake. On the first day, we took a boat ride across the lake. The water was so clear and beautiful. The next day, we rode bicycles around the lake. It was the longest bike ride I had ever done — almost 30 kilometers! I felt very tired but also very proud. On the last day, we visited a small town near the lake and bought some gifts for our families. I bought a wooden keychain for my mom. The trip was more exciting than I expected. I hope we can go on another trip next year.
question: What did the writer do on the second day of the trip?
explanation: 文章中提到「The next day, we rode bicycles around the lake」，這裡的「the next day」即指第二天。

passage: Do you want to make delicious banana pancakes? It's very easy! First, put one cup of flour and one tablespoon of sugar into a large bowl. Next, add one egg and one cup of milk. Mix everything well until it becomes smooth. Then, cut a banana into small pieces and add them to the mixture. Heat a pan with a little oil over medium heat. Pour some mixture into the pan and cook each side for about two minutes. When the pancakes turn golden brown, they are ready. You can serve them with honey or chocolate sauce. Enjoy your homemade pancakes!
question: How much flour do you need to make the pancakes?
explanation: 食譜中明確寫道「put one cup of flour」，需要使用一杯麵粉。

passage: Do you want to make delicious banana pancakes? It's very easy! First, put one cup of flour and one tablespoon of sugar into a large bowl. Next, add one egg and one cup of milk. Enjoy your homemade pancakes!
question: According to the passage, when should you add the banana pieces?
options: Before putting flour in the bowl
explanation: 食譜步驟說「Mix everything well until it becomes smooth. Then, cut a banana into small pieces and add them」，因此香蕉要在麵糊攪拌均勻後才加入。

passage: Dear Mom and Dad, I have wonderful news to share! Yesterday, I took part in the school English speech contest, and I won first place! I was very nervous before my turn. When I stood on the stage, my hands were shaking. But I remembered what you told me — to take a deep breath and speak slowly. The title of my speech was 'My Dream Job,' and I talked about wanting to become a teacher. After the contest, my English teacher said I spoke more clearly than anyone else. The prize was a new dictionary and a book about American history. I am so happy! See you on Friday. Love, Emily
question: What helped Emily stop feeling nervous?
options: Her teacher stood next to her
She read from a book on stage
She won the first prize early
explanation: Emily 在信中寫道「But I remembered what you told me — to take a deep breath and speak slowly」，是她父母的建議幫助她克服緊張。

passage: Found: A blue sports bag was found in the school gym yesterday afternoon. The bag contains a pair of white running shoes, a red towel, and a water bottle. There is also a small notebook with the name 'Kevin' written on the first page. However, the notebook has no phone number or class number. If this bag belongs to you or someone you know, please come to the Lost and Found office on the first floor. The office is open from 8:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m., Monday through Friday. You must bring your student ID card to get the bag back.
question: What item in the bag could best help find the owner?
explanation: 失物招領公告中提到包包裡「a small notebook with the name 'Kevin' written on the first page」，名字是最能幫助辨認失主的線索。
